objects.name: BI_DB_Futures_Finance_Prep_Data
objects.notes: Daily futures position change ledger for finance. Reconstructs opening balance + intraday movements between settlement windows from Dim_PositionChangeLog + Fact_Position_Futures_Snapshot. ActionType: Open/CloseOrig/PartialCloseOrig/EditSL/ChildClose/Hold. Author: Guy Manova.

objects.name: BI_DB_InterestDaily
objects.notes: Daily interest accrual per CID. Passthrough from External_Interest_Trade_InterestDaily_Daily_Data (data lake). Source: Interest microservice. All columns Tier 2 (external table source). Author: Artyom Bogomolsky.

objects.name: BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF
objects.notes: Salesforce CRM usage tracking — account history events. COPY INTO from ADLS Gold/CRM/UsageTracking parquet. Full TRUNCATE+INSERT. ID column always NULL. CreatedByManagerID = ManagerID (duplicate). Author: Katy F.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_PnL
objects.notes: Aggregated daily PnL per CID × instrument type × flags. SUM(UnrealizedPnLChange), SUM(NetProfit), COUNT(PositionID). Source: Function_PnL_Single_Day. ~111 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms
objects.notes: Unified MIMO across Trading Platform + eMoney + Options + MoneyFarm. Complex multi-path ETL with platform-specific full reloads. IsGlobalFTD from Function_MIMO_First_Deposit_All_Platforms. ~422 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_MIMO_eMoney_Platform
objects.notes: eMoney (IBAN) deposits/withdrawals. Source: eMoney_Fact_Transaction_Status. Deposits from TxTypeID=5, withdrawals negated. ROW_NUMBER dedup. Post-insert FTD recovery UPDATE. ~229 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions
objects.notes: Comprehensive revenue fact — 18+ Function_Revenue_* (commissions, fees, overnights, dividends, staking, options etc.). RevenueMetricID/CategoryID from Dim_Revenue_Metrics. Options: full reload. Staking: retroactive month. ~1709 lines.

objects.name: BI_DB_DDR_Fact_Trading_Volumes_And_Amounts
objects.notes: Daily trading volumes and invested amounts. Source: Function_Trading_Volume_PositionLevel. SUM aggregation. Optional QA dump to BI_DB_VolumeQA. Author: Guy Manova (2025-04-20, newest DDR fact). ~200 lines.

batch_7_summary.domain: DDR (Daily Data Report) — CID_Level + Aggregated tiers

ddr_domain_knowledge.fact_tables: PnL, MIMO (AllPlatforms/eMoney/Trading/Options), Revenue, Trading Volumes — all feed DDR_CID_Level or are standalone DDR components
ddr_domain_knowledge.auxiliary_pattern: Separate CID_Level_Aux + Daily_Aggregated_Aux tables for fees added post-initial design
ddr_domain_knowledge.revenue_functions: 18+ Function_Revenue_* functions are the foundational building blocks. Each calculates a specific revenue metric.
ddr_domain_knowledge.mimo_platforms: Trading Platform, eMoney (IBAN), Options (Gatsby), MoneyFarm — each has a dedicated fact table feeding into AllPlatforms union
ddr_domain_knowledge.unique_user_caveat: Time-range aggregations attribute users to last day's dimension values
ddr_domain_knowledge.datasource_pattern: TimeRange table uses DataSource column to partition standard vs auxiliary data

next_batch_plan.notes: Last 3 remaining P60+ objects. Customer_Periodic_Status is a monster (128 cols). These complete all P60+ BI_DB_dbo documentation.
